# frostmoln_launch_template (Resource)

Manages a launch template for compute instances in the Frostmoln platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "frostmoln_launch_template" "web" {
  name      = "web-server-template"
  flavor_id = data.frostmoln_flavor.medium.id
  image_id  = data.frostmoln_image.ubuntu.id
  vpc_id    = frostmoln_vpc.example.id

  ssh_key_ids        = [frostmoln_ssh_key.deploy.id]
  security_group_ids = [frostmoln_security_group.web.id]

  metadata = {
    role = "web"
  }

  tags = {
    environment = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `flavor_id` (String) The flavor ID for instances launched from this template.
- `image_id` (String) The image ID for instances launched from this template.
- `name` (String) The name of the launch template.
- `vpc_id` (String) The VPC ID for instances launched from this template.

### Optional

- `metadata` (Map of String) Key-value metadata for the launch template.
- `security_group_ids` (Set of String) The security group IDs to attach to instances launched from this template.
- `ssh_key_ids` (Set of String) The SSH key IDs to inject into instances launched from this template.
- `tags` (Map of String) Key-value tags for the launch template.
- `user_data` (String, Sensitive) User data to provide to instances at launch. This is write-only; the API does not return it.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the launch template was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the launch template.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the launch template was last updated.
